title: Welcome to Hyprnote
summary:
- The tutorial highlights the use of Speech-to-Text (STT) for transcription tasks.  
- Hyprnote is introduced as a tool designed for meetings that combines STT and LLM to maximize effectiveness.  
- Steps outlined for using Hyprnote:  
  - Wait for the video to download before starting.  
  - Create a new meeting and use the "new note and record enhanced note" feature.  
  - The feature combines your note, transcript, and additional enhancements ("magic") locally for privacy and offline functionality.  
- Key features mentioned: Privacy-focused offline chat and ready-to-use templates.  
- External resources shared:  
  - Hyprnote Discord community link.  
  - Official Hyprnote documentation link.  

No direct action items or decisions are conveyed in the transcription.
